items.title: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)
items.description: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending.   OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in a growing list of companies building their way out of single-supplier risk. items.title: Repositioning retail for the AI era
items.description: Artificial intelligence is rapidly reshaping retail, but not in the ways consumers might immediately notice. items.title: The emergence of the web data infrastructure layer for AI
items.description: AI is booming. New use cases are emerging each day. To capitalize on the technology’s potential, enterprises require data at scale. items.title: Google DeepMind is worried about what happens when millions of agents start to interact
